slides.heading: Social Media Platform Comparison
slides.description: Which platforms deserve your time and budget? Let's break it down.

slides.heading: Audience & Reach
slides.description: Compare the key metrics across top platforms.

content.title: LinkedIn
content.description: 930M+ members. Highest B2B conversion rate at 2.74%.

content.title: X (Twitter)
content.description: Best for real-time industry conversations and thought leadership.

content.title: Instagram
content.description: 2B+ monthly users. Carousel posts get 1.4x more reach than single images.

content.title: TikTok
content.description: 1.5B+ users. Highest organic reach potential for new accounts.

slides.heading: Content Strategy Steps
slides.description: Follow this process to maximize your social media ROI.

content.title: Audit Current Performance
content.description: Review last 90 days of analytics across all platforms.

content.title: Identify Top 2 Platforms
content.description: Focus where your audience is most active and engaged.

content.title: Create Platform-Specific Content
content.description: Adapt format, length, and tone for each platform.

content.title: Measure Weekly
content.description: Track engagement rate, reach, and conversions every 7 days.
